# AJ Long Electric — Site Index for AI Crawlers

> Licensed master electricians in Fairfax, VA since 1996. Family-owned
> residential and commercial electrical services across Northern Virginia,
> Washington DC, and Maryland. 1,400+ five-star reviews across four verified
> Google Business Profiles.

## Core

- [Home](https://ajlongelectric.com/): Overview of services and service areas
- [About](https://ajlongelectric.com/about/): Family-owned electrical contractor since 1996
- [Locations](https://ajlongelectric.com/locations): Our Fairfax HQ, Bowie Maryland dispatch, and Burke long-standing local presence
- [Service Areas](https://ajlongelectric.com/service-areas/): All 29 cities and counties we serve in the DMV
- [Problems](https://ajlongelectric.com/problems/): Common electrical issues and what to do
- [Guides](https://ajlongelectric.com/guides/): Long-form planning, buying, and maintenance guides
- [Blog](https://ajlongelectric.com/blog/): Articles on electrical topics, code, and Northern Virginia specifics
- [Reviews](https://ajlongelectric.com/reviews/): 1,400+ five-star Google reviews
- [FAQ](https://ajlongelectric.com/faq/): Common questions about pricing, scheduling, and our services

## Services — Power & Panels

- [Panel Upgrades](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/panel-upgrades/): 200A / 400A service upgrades for modern homes; FPE and Zinsco panel replacements
- [Service Upgrades](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/service-upgrades/): Upgrade electrical service from the utility meter to the main panel
- [Dedicated Circuits](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/dedicated-circuits/): New circuits for high-draw appliances, workshops, and home offices
- [Circuit Breaker Replacement](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/circuit-breaker-replacement/): Replace faulty, tripping, or outdated breakers
- [Surge Protection](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/surge-protection/): Whole-home protection against damaging power spikes

## Services — EV & Smart Home

- [EV Charger Installation](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/ev-charging/): Certified installation for Tesla, ChargePoint, and major EV charger brands
- [Smart Home Wiring](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/smart-home/): Smart switches, thermostats, and video doorbell integration
- [USB Outlets](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/usb-outlets/): Outlets with built-in USB-A and USB-C charging ports
- [Kitchen Electrical](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/kitchen-electrical/): Specialized wiring for kitchen remodels and appliances
- [Energy Efficiency](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/energy-efficiency/): Reduce energy consumption with smart electrical upgrades

## Services — Lighting

- [Recessed Lighting](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/recessed-lighting/): Energy-efficient LED recessed lighting installation
- [Outdoor Lighting](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/outdoor-lighting/): Landscape, security, and patio lighting
- [Chandelier Installation](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/chandelier-installation/): Expert mounting for chandeliers of all sizes
- [Dimmer Switches](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/dimmer-switches/): Smooth, flicker-free dimmers for LED and incandescent lighting
- [Motion Sensor Lighting](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/motion-sensor-lighting/): Automated motion-activated lighting
- [Ceiling Fans](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/ceiling-fans/): Ceiling and exhaust fan installation
- [Bathroom Exhaust Fans](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/bathroom-exhaust-fans/): Quiet exhaust fans for moisture and odor removal

## Services — Safety & Code

- [Electrical Inspections](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/inspections/): Safety audits for home buyers and maintenance
- [GFCI Outlets](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/gfci-outlets/): Code-required ground-fault protection
- [Smoke Detectors](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/smoke-detectors/): Hardwired, interconnected smoke and CO detectors
- [Code Updates](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/code-updates/): Bring electrical systems up to current NEC standards
- [Aluminum Wiring Remediation](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/aluminum-wiring/): Fix the fire hazard of aluminum branch wiring
- [Knob-and-Tube Replacement](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/knob-tube-replacement/): Replace outdated knob-and-tube wiring

## Services — Specialty & Repair

- [Generator Installation](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/generators/): Portable generator hookups (transfer switches, interlock kits, inlet boxes) and battery backup power stations (EcoFlow, Bluetti, Anker SOLIX)
- [Pool & Hot Tub Wiring](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/pool-hot-tub-wiring/): Code-compliant wiring for pools, hot tubs, and spas
- [Home Theater Wiring](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/home-theater-wiring/): In-wall wiring for media rooms
- [Electrical Repair](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/repair/): Diagnosis and repair of flickering lights, dead outlets, and faults
- [Emergency Repairs](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/emergency-repairs/): 24/7 emergency electrical service for dangerous situations
- [Commercial Electrical](https://ajlongelectric.com/services/commercial/): Reliable electrical for offices, retail, and commercial properties

## Problems (high-intent diagnostic content)

- [Burning Smell from Outlet](https://ajlongelectric.com/problems/burning-smell-from-outlet/): Emergency warning sign of overheating; turn off the breaker and call immediately
- [Sparking Outlet](https://ajlongelectric.com/problems/sparking-outlet/): Large or persistent sparks indicate a serious electrical problem
- [Hot Outlet](https://ajlongelectric.com/problems/hot-outlet/): An outlet warm to the touch indicates electrical resistance and overheating
- [Tripping Breakers](https://ajlongelectric.com/problems/tripping-breakers/): Repeated breaker trips point to an underlying overload or fault
- [Flickering Lights](https://ajlongelectric.com/problems/flickering-lights/): When persistent flickering indicates an electrical problem
- [Dead Outlet](https://ajlongelectric.com/problems/dead-outlet/): GFCI / breaker reset checklist, then when to call a professional
- [Buzzing Switches](https://ajlongelectric.com/problems/buzzing-switches/): LED-dimmer buzz vs. faulty switches that need replacement
- [Not Enough Outlets](https://ajlongelectric.com/problems/not-enough-outlets/): Add outlets to eliminate extension cords and reduce overload risk
- [Outdated Two-Prong Outlets](https://ajlongelectric.com/problems/outdated-two-prong-outlets/): Upgrade paths from ungrounded outlets in older homes
- [Frequent Bulb Burnout](https://ajlongelectric.com/problems/frequent-bulb-burnout/): Patterns that indicate voltage issues or fixture problems

## Guides

- [Complete Guide to Electrical Panel Upgrades](https://ajlongelectric.com/guides/electrical-panel-upgrade-guide/): When to upgrade, cost factors, the upgrade process, and choosing an electrician
- [How to Prepare for EV Charger Installation](https://ajlongelectric.com/guides/how-to-prepare-for-ev-charger-installation/): Panel assessment, location selection, permits, installation day
- [Backup Power Installation Guide](https://ajlongelectric.com/guides/whole-home-generator-installation-guide/): Portable generator hookups, battery backup power stations, transfer switches, sizing, costs, and installation
- [Home Electrical Safety Inspection Checklist](https://ajlongelectric.com/guides/home-electrical-safety-inspection-checklist/): Room-by-room hazard identification
- [Electrical Panel Maintenance Guide](https://ajlongelectric.com/guides/electrical-panel-maintenance-guide/): Safe homeowner inspection vs. when to call a professional
- [Understanding Electrical Permits in Northern Virginia](https://ajlongelectric.com/guides/understanding-electrical-permits-northern-virginia/): Permit rules in Fairfax County, Arlington, Alexandria, and Loudoun
- [Choosing the Right EV Charger](https://ajlongelectric.com/guides/choosing-the-right-ev-charger/): Tesla Wall Connector vs. ChargePoint vs. JuiceBox comparison
- [Planning Home Electrical Renovation](https://ajlongelectric.com/guides/planning-home-electrical-renovation/): Permits, costs, timelines, working with electricians

## Locations (Google Business Profile entity pages)

- [Fairfax HQ — 2724 Dorr Ave, Suite 102](https://ajlongelectric.com/locations/fairfax-va/): Our headquarters since 1996; open 24 hours; (703) 997-0026
- [Bowie, MD Maryland Dispatch — 15518 Orchard Run Dr](https://ajlongelectric.com/locations/bowie-md/): Maryland-side coordination for Bowie and Prince George's County; (301) 679-7447
- [Burke, VA Long-Standing Local Presence — 5244 Lyngate Ct](https://ajlongelectric.com/locations/burke-va/): Decades of Burke-area service; (571) 616-9996
- [Annandale Service Area](https://ajlongelectric.com/service-areas/annandale/): Long-standing local coverage; service-area page only
